title: Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The latest Allahabad High Court Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Special Judicial Magistrate posts! Published at allahabadhighcourt.in, this new recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier and possessing a Degree in Law or equivalent experience in legal affairs can apply offline from now to 25-07-2026. Find all details about the Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, offline application form, and notificati

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier.
age_limit.details: Term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree of law or otherwise well experienced in relation to legal affairs. Must hold or have held any post under the Government.
qualification.details: Degree of law or otherwise well experienced in relation to legal affairs to the satisfaction of the High Court. Holds or has held any post under the Government.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 45,000/- per month and Rs. 5000/- per month for conveyance
salary_details.details: Rs. 45,000/- per month (Honorarium) Rs. 5000/- per month (Conveyance)

selection_process: Scrutiny of Form by District Judge Forwarding of fit applications to High Court Selection by High Court
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: allahabadhighcourt.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
